# viettelidc_vks_nfs_storage (Resource)

Provides a VKS NFS Storage resource. Note: Creation is explicitly disabled via Terraform. Use `terraform import` to manage existing NFS Storage.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    viettelidc = {
      source = "viettelidc/viettelidc"
    }
  }
}

# The viettelidc_vks_nfs_storage resource does not support creation via Terraform. 
# It must be created via the web console and then imported using 'terraform import'.
# Example usage after import:
resource "viettelidc_vks_nfs_storage" "example" {
  cluster_id   = "cluster-123456"
  storage_size = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the Kubernetes Cluster.
- `storage_size` (Number) Size of the NFS storage in GB.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the NFS storage resource, formatted as cluster_id/nfs.
- `status` (String) Status of the NFS storage.
